discovery_rule: Every regular file directly under scripts/ must be listed here and split into one or more modules.

scripts.description: Hermes-oriented shell wrapper for Git-SCV install, case creation, briefing, artifact path display, and cleanup.

modules.responsibility: Common error path, help text, user-intent command map, and top-level dispatch.
Local case root selection, Rust case CLI delegation, legacy snapshot run artifact discovery, artifact path printing, and listing.
Install, update, uninstall, and version commands for Git-SCV itself.
Create a case package, invoke git-scv inspect or snapshot, print artifact paths, and immediately print the mandatory brief.
Delegate brief and next-action checks to Rust case CLI and expose first-class brief, architecture, gate, and review artifacts.
Delegate deletion to Rust case delete/prune with exact acknowledgement and case sentinel checks.

scripts.description: Non-secret example adapter for routing a Git-SCV worker prompt to a local LLM coding-agent CLI outside the target repository.

modules.responsibility: Read a Git-SCV worker prompt from stdin, invoke one non-shell coding-agent command selected by non-secret environment overrides, forward stdout/stderr, and avoid storing OAuth/API credentials.
